title: Small Improvement in Steel Output Ex-China
section_path: Small Improvement in Steel Output Ex-China
section_path_text: Small Improvement in Steel Output Ex-China
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Global steel production totaled approximately 153.4 million tons in April. This is down month-on-month by 6.5 million tons (-4%) and is down year-on-year by 2.3 million tons (-2%). Steel production ex-China totaled approximately 69.8 million tons.
